llm_response:
# Vacation Approval Notice

Dear Team Member,

I am writing to formally acknowledge your recent request for scheduled time off. We have reviewed your application carefully and noted the specific dates you have selected for your well-deserved break. It is important to remember that We value your contributions to the team, and ensuring you have adequate rest is a priority for our shared success.

I am pleased to confirm that your vacation days have been fully approved for the requested period. You may now proceed with your plans knowing that your absence will be covered appropriately. Please ensure you complete the following steps before your departure:
*   Submit your final project reports to the main server.
*   Update all shared calendars to reflect your unavailability.
*   Hand over any pending tasks to your designated colleague.

To finalize the process, please visit our internal portal at [HR Portal](https://hr-portal.example.com) to confirm your time off in the system. Additionally, do not forget to set an automatic email response so clients know when to expect a reply. We look forward to seeing you return refreshed and ready for new challenges.
